harness.js:59:2-74:5
> ChildProcess["exec"](killCommand, function(err, stdout, stderr) {
  if ((err || stderr))   return next((err || stderr["toString"]()));
  stdout = stdout["toString"]();
  if ((process["platform"] !== "darwin")) {
    setTimeout(function() { next(null, stdout); }, 200);
    return ;
  }
  next(null, stdout);
});

Reached sensitive command-injection sink 'child_process.exec' with symbolic expr:
(str.++ "taskkill /F /PID " payload)
